name: compass-coaching-portal
description: Compass Coaching — second per-client portal. Validates the multi-client materialization pattern with a slim plugin set (no ecommerce, no affiliates) + a different brand kit + DM Serif headings. Reference target shape #2 for the export-to-repo generator (T2 R11). Deploys to compasscoaching.com; auth round-trips to milesymedia.com.
